Scheme Details: Aims to increase production of cereals through area expansion and productivity enhancement in sustainable manner. Provides seed distribution subsidies, IPM, INM, and mechanization support. Coverage/commodity focus: Rice. Responsible authority: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare (MoA&FW); Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare (DA&FW). Implementing office/agency: NFSM Division (DA&FW) + State Agriculture Departments. Office address (HQ): Krishi Bhawan, New Delhi-110001. Typical support may include one or more of the following (scheme-specific): direct benefit transfer (DBT), input subsidy/assistance, seed/planting material support, infrastructure support (micro-irrigation/protected cultivation/storage), demonstrations/training, price support/market linkage, or risk coverage (insurance). How to apply (general): apply via the scheme/state portal (website link) or through nearest Agriculture/Horticulture office, CSC/e-Mitra/Seva Kendra, or notified bank/insurance channel (for insurance schemes). Common documents (general): Aadhaar, land record/tenant proof (if required), bank account details (IFSC), mobile number; for crop insurance: sowing/acreage details and crop/season information as notified. Helpline/phone: 1800-180-1551. Email: nfsm.hq@gov.in. Official webpage: https://nfsm.gov.in/.
Responsible Ministry/Department: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare (MoA&FW); Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare (DA&FW)
Implementing Office/Agency: NFSM Division (DA&FW) + State Agriculture Departments
Office Address (HQ): Krishi Bhawan, New Delhi-110001
